sent_simp: 这只是问题的表象，背后原因更复杂。
sent_trad: 這只是問題的表象，背後原因更複雜。
pinyin: Zhè zhǐ shì wèntí de biǎoxiàng, bèihòu yuányīn gèng fùzá.
english: This is only the surface appearance of the problem; the underlying cause is more complex.

sent_simp: 燃烧木柴会释放出大量热能。
sent_trad: 燃燒木柴會釋放出大量熱能。
pinyin: Ránshāo mùchái huì shìfàng chū dàliàng rènéng.
english: Burning wood releases a large amount of heat energy.

sent_simp: 她在面板上擀开了饺子皮。
sent_trad: 她在麵板上擀開了餃子皮。
pinyin: Tā zài miànbǎn shàng gǎn kāi le jiǎozi pí.
english: She rolled out the dumpling wrappers on the kneading board.
